name: voicedraft-root
description: VoiceDraft AI Voice Writing Assistant MVP

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix desktop
scripts.copy-backend: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.join('backend', 'dist'); const dest=path.join('desktop', 'backend-dist'); if(fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.rmSync(dest, {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.cpSync(src, dest, {recursive:true}); console.log('Backend copied to desktop.');"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run copy-backend && npm run build:desktop
scripts.dev: npm run build:backend && npm run copy-backend && concurrently "tsc -w --prefix backend" "node -e \"const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.join('backend', 'dist'); const dest=path.join('desktop', 'backend-dist'); fs.watch(src, {recursive:true}, (evt, filename) => { try { if(fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.rmSync(dest, {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.cpSync(src, dest, {recursive:true}); console.log('Sync backend changes...'); } catch(e){} });\"" "npm start --prefix desktop"
